Notes: Opening round of the Park Lodge Invitational Women's BB Tourney
Tufts advances to Park Lodge Tournament Championship game versus Regis at 3 PM
Game.Officials: Kerri Lang,  Ashley Britton,  Mary Bradbury

Descriptions.Efficiency:
Efficiency:

Descriptions.UsagePercentage:
Usage Percentage: The percentage of team plays used by a player. 
(FGA + (0.44 * FTA) + TO) / POSS
